# Luca Berton — AI & Cloud Advisor, Docker Captain

> Luca Berton is an independent AI and Cloud Advisor based in Europe. He helps enterprises design GPU inference platforms, Kubernetes architectures, automation strategies, and AI governance frameworks. Author of 8+ technical books on Ansible and Kubernetes. Speaker at KubeCon, Red Hat Summit, and cloud-native conferences.

Luca specializes in:
- AI infrastructure on Kubernetes (GPU scheduling, distributed inference, MLOps)
- Platform engineering and developer experience
- Enterprise automation with Ansible and Terraform
- Cloud-native architecture and migration strategies
- Security hardening and compliance (EU AI Act, CRA, NIS2, DORA)

Key facts:
- Based in Europe, works with global enterprises
- 8+ published books (Ansible, Kubernetes)
- KubeCon Europe 2026 speaker: "Multi-Tenant GPUs on Bare Metal"
- Claude Certified Architect (Anthropic)
- Red Hat Certified Engineer
- 840+ technical blog posts
- Consulting via Calendly: https://calendly.com/lucaberton/

## Services

- [AI Integration & Strategy](https://lucaberton.com/services/ai-integration/): AI readiness assessments, GPU infrastructure design (NVIDIA H100/A100, multi-node inference), LLM deployment architecture (vLLM, NVIDIA NIM, TGI), model governance frameworks, EU AI Act compliance. Deliverables: architecture blueprint, GPU sizing document, model selection matrix, 90-day implementation roadmap.
- [Kubernetes Workshops](https://lucaberton.com/services/kubernetes-workshops/): Hands-on K8s training for teams, multi-tenant GPU clusters with MIG and time-slicing, operator development, production hardening, CKA/CKAD preparation. Deliverables: workshop materials, lab environments, certification prep guides.
- [Automation Strategy](https://lucaberton.com/services/automation-strategy/): Ansible automation at enterprise scale (1000+ nodes), Infrastructure as Code with Terraform, CI/CD pipeline design (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, ArgoCD), GitOps implementation. Deliverables: automation playbooks, IaC modules, pipeline templates, runbooks.
- [Cloud Infrastructure](https://lucaberton.com/services/cloud-infrastructure/): Multi-cloud architecture (AWS, Azure, GCP), Kubernetes migration from VMs, cost optimization (FinOps), disaster recovery design. Deliverables: migration plan, cost analysis, DR runbooks, architecture diagrams.
- [Performance Optimization](https://lucaberton.com/services/performance-optimization/): Infrastructure performance audits, GPU utilization optimization, observability stack design (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Tempo), SLO-driven operations. Deliverables: performance report, optimization recommendations, monitoring dashboards.

## Books

- [Kubernetes Recipes](https://lucaberton.com/kubernetes-recipes/): Practical cookbook with 100+ recipes for Kubernetes operations, troubleshooting, and production management. Published 2024.
- [Practical RHEL AI](https://lucaberton.com/practical-rhel-ai/): Hands-on guide to Red Hat Enterprise Linux AI with InstructLab fine-tuning. Published 2025.
- [Ansible for Real-Life Automation](https://lucaberton.com/books/): Published by Packt, comprehensive guide covering modules, playbooks, roles, collections, and enterprise patterns.
- [Ansible Pilot](https://lucaberton.com/books/): Step-by-step Ansible automation from basics to advanced patterns.

## Courses

- [Courses Overview](https://lucaberton.com/courses/): Online courses on Ansible, Kubernetes, DevOps, Linux, and cloud platforms available on Udemy and Coursera.

- [About](https://lucaberton.com/about/): Professional background, certifications (RHCE, CKA, Claude Certified Architect), and experience
- [Conference Speaking](https://lucaberton.com/conferences/): KubeCon, Red Hat Summit, Cloud Native Rejekts, and other speaking engagements
- [KubeCon Europe 2026](https://lucaberton.com/kubecon/): Talk details on multi-tenant GPUs on bare metal, slide download (PDF), and consultation booking
- [GPU Cost Calculator](https://lucaberton.com/gpu-cost-calculator/): Interactive tool to compare cloud vs on-premises GPU infrastructure costs for AI workloads
- [Book Signing](https://lucaberton.com/book-signing/): Information about upcoming book signing events
- [Contact](https://lucaberton.com/contact/): Contact form and consultation booking via Calendly
- [Blog](https://lucaberton.com/blog/): 840+ technical articles organized by categories: AI, Platform Engineering, Automation, DevOps, Open Source

## Blog — AI & GPU Infrastructure

- [Enterprise AI Governance Framework](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-ai-governance-framework-2026/): Complete governance framework with model registry template, EU AI Act risk tiers (Unacceptable/High/Limited/Minimal), data lineage tracking, accountability matrix (AI Ethics Board, Model Owner, Data Owner, ML Engineer, CISO, DPO), monitoring requirements, audit documentation, and quarterly implementation roadmap.
- [On-Premises LLM Deployment for Regulated Industries](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-llm-deployment-patterns-on-premises-2026/): Deployment patterns for banking, healthcare, defense, and government. Covers vLLM and NVIDIA NIM on air-gapped Kubernetes, model selection table (Llama 3.1 70B, Mistral Large, Qwen 2.5, DeepSeek-R1, Granite), security architecture with network segmentation, audit logging, and cost breakeven analysis (on-prem vs API at scale).
- [NVIDIA NIM Multinode Inference](https://lucaberton.com/blog/nvidia-nim-multinode-inference-large-models-2026/): Deploying 400B+ parameter models across multiple GPU nodes. Tensor parallelism vs pipeline parallelism, Docker and Kubernetes (LeaderWorkerSet) deployment, NCCL configuration, InfiniBand networking, performance benchmarks, and supported models (DeepSeek-R1, Llama 405B, Nemotron 340B).
- [NVIDIA Run:ai Distributed Inference Platform Guide](https://lucaberton.com/blog/nvidia-run-ai-distributed-inference-platform-2026/): Run:ai platform for orchestrating distributed inference. Single-node (Knative) vs multi-node (LWS), topology-aware scheduling, MNNVL support, Dynamo pipeline integration, autoscaling, NIM/HuggingFace catalogs.
- [Tutorial: Deploy DeepSeek-R1 with Run:ai + NIM](https://lucaberton.com/blog/nvidia-run-ai-nim-distributed-inference-tutorial-2026/): Step-by-step tutorial from official docs. Access keys, NGC credentials, PVC data source (2TB), leader-worker deployment with full API + CLI commands, SGLang runtime, environment variable reference, OpenShift security context, endpoint testing, troubleshooting.
- [NVIDIA GPU Operator on Kubernetes](https://lucaberton.com/blog/nvidia-gpu-operator-kubernetes-ai-ml/): Installation, configuration, and management of the GPU Operator for AI/ML workloads on Kubernetes.
- [The Inference Gold Rush](https://lucaberton.com/blog/inference-gold-rush-ai-startups-kubernetes-2026/): Market analysis covering xPyD architectures, GAIE framework, prefix caching, multi-accelerator inference, startup valuations.
- [FinOps for AI GPU Workloads](https://lucaberton.com/blog/finops-ai-gpu-workloads-cost-optimization-2026/): GPU cost optimization including spot instances, time-slicing, MIG partitioning, right-sizing, and chargeback models.
- [RHEL AI Tutorial](https://lucaberton.com/blog/rhel-ai-tutorial-complete-beginners-guide-2026/): Complete guide to Red Hat Enterprise Linux AI including InstructLab, model training, and deployment.
- [InstructLab Fine-Tuning Guide](https://lucaberton.com/blog/instructlab-fine-tuning-guide-rhel-ai-2026/): Fine-tune open models with InstructLab's taxonomy-driven approach on RHEL AI.
- [MLOps Pipeline on Kubernetes](https://lucaberton.com/blog/mlops-pipeline-kubernetes-enterprise-2026/): End-to-end MLOps with Kubeflow Pipelines, MLflow model registry, Feast feature store, automated retraining via drift detection, and A/B testing patterns.
- [AI on Kubernetes in Production (10-part series)](https://lucaberton.com/blog/ai-kubernetes-production-getting-started-guide/): Comprehensive series covering agent tuning, token economics, team contracts, architecture decisions, observability, autoscaling inference, and first 90 days roadmap.

## Blog — Kubernetes & Platform Engineering

- [Kubernetes Multi-Cluster Management](https://lucaberton.com/blog/kubernetes-multi-cluster-management-enterprise-2026/): Fleet management with ArgoCD ApplicationSets, Cluster API (CAPI), Rancher Fleet, cross-cluster networking (Submariner, Cilium ClusterMesh, Istio), and DR patterns.
- [Kubernetes Security Hardening Checklist](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-kubernetes-security-hardening-checklist-2026/): 50 checks across pod security (PSS enforcement, seccomp, capabilities), RBAC (least privilege, audit), network (default deny, mTLS), secrets (Vault, CSI driver), images (signing, scanning), runtime (Falco, Tetragon), and compliance (CIS benchmark, audit logging).
- [Enterprise GitOps Maturity Model](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-gitops-maturity-model-2026/): 5 levels from manual kubectl to fully automated multi-cluster GitOps. Self-assessment checklist (/50), ArgoCD patterns, Argo Rollouts progressive delivery, and policy-as-code gates.
- [Cloud Migration to Kubernetes](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-cloud-migration-kubernetes-strategy-2026/): 6R framework (Rehost, Replatform, Refactor, Repurchase, Retire, Retain) adapted for K8s. Application readiness scoring, 4-phase migration plan (Foundation → Quick Wins → Core → Optimization), and common pitfalls.
- [Enterprise Observability Stack](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-observability-stack-kubernetes-2026/): LGTM stack (Mimir, Loki, Tempo, Grafana) with OpenTelemetry Collector config, tail sampling, sizing guide by cluster size, AI-powered anomaly detection, and SLO-based error budget alerting.
- [API Gateway Comparison](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-api-gateway-kubernetes-comparison-2026/): Kong vs Envoy Gateway vs APISIX vs Traefik feature matrix covering Gateway API support, rate limiting, auth, WAF, plugin ecosystem, performance (p99 latency), and licensing.
- [Disaster Recovery for Kubernetes](https://lucaberton.com/blog/enterprise-disaster-recovery-kubernetes-2026/): Active-active, active-passive, and pilot light patterns with RTO/RPO targets. Velero backup configuration, automated DNS failover, DR runbook template, and quarterly testing methodology.
- [Backstage Developer Portal](https://lucaberton.com/blog/backstage-internal-developer-portal-setup-guide-2026/): Setup guide for Spotify's Backstage as internal developer portal.
- [Platform Engineering Metrics](https://lucaberton.com/blog/platform-engineering-metrics-measure-success-2026/): DORA metrics, developer experience KPIs, and platform adoption measurement.
- [Kubernetes Gateway API](https://lucaberton.com/blog/kubernetes-gateway-api-guide-ingress-replacement-2026/): Guide to the Gateway API as Ingress replacement.

## Blog — Automation & DevOps

- [Ansible Error Fix Guides](https://lucaberton.com/blog/ansible-error-unreachable-fix/): 50+ troubleshooting articles for common Ansible errors including UNREACHABLE, MODULE FAILURE, PERMISSION DENIED, and syntax errors.
- [Docker Error Fix Guides](https://lucaberton.com/blog/docker-error-no-space-left-on-device-fix/): 50+ troubleshooting articles for Docker errors including no space left, permission denied, network conflicts, and build failures.
- [Kubernetes Error Fix Guides](https://lucaberton.com/blog/kubernetes-error-crashloopbackoff-fix/): 50+ troubleshooting articles for Kubernetes errors including CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled, ImagePullBackOff, and scheduling failures.
- [GitHub Actions CI/CD Tutorial](https://lucaberton.com/blog/github-actions-cicd-pipeline-tutorial-2026/): Complete pipeline setup from scratch.
- [ArgoCD Cheat Sheet](https://lucaberton.com/blog/argocd-cheat-sheet-2026/): Quick reference for ArgoCD CLI and operations.
- [Helm vs Kustomize](https://lucaberton.com/blog/helm-vs-kustomize-2026/): Decision guide for Kubernetes package management.

## Blog — Security & Compliance

- [EU Cyber Resilience Act](https://lucaberton.com/blog/eu-cyber-resilience-act-2024-what-businesses-need-to-know/): Business impact analysis and compliance requirements for digital products.
- [Zero Trust Architecture](https://lucaberton.com/blog/zero-trust-architecture-2026/): Enterprise implementation guide with identity-centric security, microsegmentation, and continuous verification.
- [Microsoft 365 Enhanced Data Encryption](https://lucaberton.com/blog/microsoft-365-enhanced-data-encryption-enterprise-guide/): 4-layer encryption stack (BitLocker/TLS → Service Encryption → Customer Key → DKE), compliance mapping for GDPR/DORA/NIS2/HIPAA.
- [Microsoft Copilot Enterprise Guide](https://lucaberton.com/blog/microsoft-copilot-chat-2026-enterprise-guide/): M365 Copilot app, paid web tier, chat pinning, integrated apps, channel readiness, 4-phase deployment roadmap.

- [OpenEmpower.com](https://www.openempower.com): Open source empowerment, community building, and advocacy
